title: Clutch (clone)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|[[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] Clutch, designated TK-571|the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] designated [[TK-571]], or other uses of [[Clutch (disambiguation)|Clutch]]|linebreak=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image=[[File:TK571-JediYoda.jpg]] |name=Clutch
TK-571 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] {{C|[[Cloning/Legends|clone]]}}''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Tan]] |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We take the palace, and this whole conflict ends right here, right now.|Commander Clutch|}} '''Clutch''', designated '''TK-571''', was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Like all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], Clutch was [[Cloning/Legends|cloned]] from the [[DNA/Legends|genetic code]] of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]—a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] who served as the [[Clone template/Legends|template]] of the [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] clone [[Army/Legends|army]]. As such, they were trained to fight as a [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By the [[22 BBY/Legends|first year]] of the conflict, Clutch was serving as a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the forces led by the [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi generals]] [[Tyffix]] and [[Tyr]], both of whom were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] insurgents during the [[Battle of Thustra|campaign]] on [[Thustra]]. Command of the clone army on the Sephi [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] defaulted to the [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi commanders]] [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]] and [[Pix (Jedi)|Pix]], whom Clutch assisted until the arrival of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Pix was left in command by Yoda, who journeyed to the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] with Cal at his side, in order to [[Diplomat/Legends|negotiate]] with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]]. Although the [[General/Legends|general]] gave Pix instructions to not engage the Sephi during his absence, Clutch [[Advisor/Legends|advised]] the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] commander to launch a preemptive strike before their enemies could attack the Republic army's position. Ultimately, [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Navi]] deceived Clutch and Pix into believing that the king executed her fellow Jedi. Pix deployed her forces in a full-scale assault on the capital, with Clutch relaying her orders to the clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]]. Following the battle, Clutch returned to the [[The galaxy|galactic]] capital [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] with Pix and Yoda. Navi's [[Treason/Legends|deception]] was revealed before the entire [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], resulting in his arrest by the clone commander and two [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]]. ==Biography== ===Origin=== Created on the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]]-covered [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], TK-571{{CSWECite|I|132|Clutch, Commander (TK-571)}} was a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Using Fett's [[DNA/Legends|DNA]] as a [[Clone template/Legends|genetic template]], [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] engineered millions of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] for the purpose of creating a vast army for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The clones were officially commissioned as the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. By that time, the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] had escalated into full-scale rebellion; various planetary and [[Sector/Legends|sectoral]] governments seceded from the Republic and formed the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Holding the rank of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]], TK-571 would eventually take on the name Clutch. ===The Battle of Thustra=== {{Quote|The worst of it was that they were using themselves as weapons—throwing ''themselves'' at us and detonating their explosives. Very difficult to defend against. A brilliant strategy, if it can be maintained.|Commander Clutch, reporting on the Sephi's suicide tactics|}} [[File:Pix-Clutch-Thustra.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Commander Clutch serving under Jedi Padawan Pix during the Battle of Thustra]] Approximately during the conflict, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Clutch and an army of clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] were dispatched to the planet [[Thustra/Legends|Thustra]] with orders to suppress a growing secessionist movement amongst the native [[Sephi/Legends|Sephi]] [[Species/Legends|race]]. It was believed that the presence of a military garrison would be sufficient enough to dispel further notions of insurrection. The assumption was proven false when the Sephi launched several surprise attacks against Republic troops. By dawn, the Republic sustained many casualties, including the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi Generals]] [[Tyffix]] and [[Tyr]]. With both [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Masters]] dead, command fell to their [[Padawan/Legends|padawans]], [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commanders]] [[Cal (Jedi)|Cal]] and [[Pix (Jedi)|Pix]] respectively. Unwilling to accept the repercussions of Thustra's alliance with the Separatists, [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] journeyed to the rebellious world in hopes of renewing its allegiance to the Republic through diplomacy. Shortly after Yoda's arrival, he and Cal made their way to Thustra's [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] to negotiate with [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric]]; Pix was left in command of the clone troopers with explicit orders to avoid a fight with the Sephi. During Yoda's absence, Commander Clutch remained at Pix's side as her second-in-command. Both Clutch and Pix were ultimately manipulated into disobeying Yoda's orders. [[Loyalist/Legends|Loyalist]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Navi]] of Thustra sought to foil his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] rebellion by forcing the Republic to take action. Hence, he secretly traveled to the Republic base and falsely claimed that Yoda and Cal had been executed by the order of King Alaric. The deception worked; Pix launched a full-scale assault on the Sephi capital. Clutch remained at the Jedi Commander's side during the [[Battle of Thustra]] and oversaw the fighting from an [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|LAAT/i]] [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] on the frontlines. [[File:Thustra3.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Commander Clutch's clone troopers executing a forward assault on the Sephi rebels]] As the Republic stormed the capital city in full force, Clutch directed the clone troopers to concentrate their efforts on capturing the King's [[palace]]. According to Senator Navi, the capture of the palace and its main occupant would destabilize the rebels' cause, thus ending the conflict on Thustra with a decisive victory for the Republic. The attack ultimately backfired, as Yoda anticipated. Clutch and Pix had not expected that [[King/Legends|King]] [[Alaric (Sephi)|Alaric's]] suicide, combined with the Republic's assault on the capital, would invigorate the Sephi to double their efforts at resistance. Furthermore, neighboring [[Star system/Legends|systems]] within the [[Sumitra sector/Legends|Sumitra sector]] became motivated by Alaric's martyrdom to send armies in support of the Sephi's cause. The combined resistance of various systems within a sector forced the Republic out of Thustra, hence resulting in its alliance with the Separatists. On [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Senator Navi was reporting the events on Thustra to his peers in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] when Yoda and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] arrived to reveal Navi's deceitfulness. Clutch and Pix were both present as the Senator was arrested for [[Treason/Legends|treason]] by two [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senate Guards]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Strategically, our best chance to hit them is now, before they can fully form up.''"
"''We can't do that. Master Yoda's orders were—''"
"''I know… But we can't wait here indefinitely. Soon we'll have to choose between following General Yoda's orders… And saving our own lives.|Clutch and Pix|}} [[File:CloneTrooperCaptain-TCWvg.png|thumb|left|200px|Commander Clutch in Phase I clone armor]] As with the other clones of Jango Fett, Clutch was created to be an efficient soldier, programmed with absolute loyalty to the Galactic Republic. They stood at 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and had [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin. Clutch displayed a keen attention to the details of a battle, as demonstrated when they took note of the specific causes behind the Sephi's successful tactics. Clutch was particularly impressed by the enemy's willingness to resort to suicidal [[Ramming/Legends|bombings]]. In the commander's opinion, it was an effective strategy, so long as it could be maintained. Although Clutch was a loyal adherent to the command structure of the Grand Army, they possessed enough independent thought to suggest circumventing a superior officer's order if absolutely necessary. While serving under Pix, Clutch advised the young Jedi Commander that a preemptive strike—in defiance of General Yoda's instructions—on the enemy was the only efficient way to end the conflict with minimum casualties on the Republic's side. Nevertheless, Clutch's ingrained sense of obedience prevented them from acting without the consent of their immediate Jedi superior officer. ==Equipment== As a clone trooper in the Grand Army of the Republic, Clutch was outfitted with the standard [[Phase I clone trooper armor/Legends|Phase I clone trooper armor]] and armed with a [[DC-15A blaster rifle/Legends|DC-15A blaster rifle]]. Although Clutch held the rank of commander, their [[Armor/Legends|armor]] sported the [[Color/Legends|red]] color patterns of a [[Clone Captain/Legends|clone trooper captain]].''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]'' During their time on Thustra, the clone used [[Electrobinoculars/Legends|electrobinoculars]] to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on Sephi troop movements. ==Behind the scenes== Clutch appeared in ''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'', a comic story part of the [[Star Wars: Jedi (one-shots)|''Star Wars: Jedi'' one-shots]] series released on [[July 21]], [[2004]].{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/54285/star_wars_jedi_-_yoda_2004_1|text=Star Wars: Jedi - Yoda (2004) #1}} Identified as "Clutch" in the comic, the clone would eventually receive the designation "TK-571" in the ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. In the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', there was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] identified as [[TK-571]] taking part in the [[Empire Day/Legends|Empire Day]] festivities of [[2009]] through [[2011]], though this stormtrooper had not been identified to be Clutch.''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Jedi: Yoda]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|TK-571}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=TK-571 |nl=TK-571 |pl=TK-571 }} [[Category:Clone trooper commanders]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]]
